texto: Wendy is still dead. I hadn't understood before: it really doesn't bring them back. Somehow, you think, despite what you know, it will be a trade. Find the person who did the wrong thing and they will suffer instead of the one who was killed. Instead, that person just suffers too.
explicacao: Citação de Mariah Fredericks sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Wendy is still dead. I hadn't understood before: it really doesn't bring them back. Somehow, you …” articula reflexao, justice, revenge em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e revenge.
